chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD Cr. Bail Application No.S-621 of 2021 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For hearing of main case. 22.10.2021. Mr. Abdul Azeem Abbasi, Advocate for applicant alongwith applicant. Mr. Nazar Muhammad Memon, Additional P.G. = MUHAMMAD IQBAL KALHORO,- Applicant / accused has been nominated by complainant in the F.I.R to have accompanied other co-accused, and had waylaid them traveling in a car for going to Karachi on the day of incident viz. 28.09.2013, out of whom accused Fayyaz Ahmed had caused a firearm injury to him, whereas applicant and an unknown accused had held him of his collar. Except factum of absconsion, no other material substantially connecting the applicant with the alleged offence has been brought on record. Allegation against him of holding collar of the victim while co- accused was firing at him is not without element of incredulity. Applicant’s Counsel submits that he was not aware of registration of the case and being a factory labourer he was performing his duty regularly. It has also been informed that main accused Fayyaz Ahmed was convicted and finally in revision application his sentence was reduced to the period already undergone by him and he has been released. Learned Additional P.G in view of the above facts has not opposed grant of bail to the applicant. Accordingly, this application in view of the facts and circumstances, as discussed above, is allowed and ad-interim pre-arrest bail already granted to the applicant vide order dated 30.07.2021 is hereby confirmed on same terms and conditions.

Learned Additional P.G in view of the above facts has not opposed grant of bail to the applicant. Accordingly, this application in view of the facts and circumstances, as discussed above, is allowed and ad-interim pre-arrest bail already granted to the applicant vide order dated 30.07.2021 is hereby confirmed on same terms and conditions. JUDGE Shahid
